Items.Title: Japan run riot as Tunisia eliminated in Renard's first game
Items.Description: Ayase Ueda scores twice to help Japan to a thumping 4-0 win, as Herve Renard's first game in charge of Tunisia ends with his side being eliminated from the 2026 World Cup.

Items.Title: Goalline technology denies Japan goal by fractions
Items.Description: Tunisia goalkeeper Aymen Dahmen makes an "unbelievable save" to prevent Japan from doubling their lead by the finest of margins, in their 2026 World Cup match at Estadio Monterrey.

Items.Title: Special Commemorative Patches for 1000th FIFA World Cup Match
Items.Description: To mark a significant milestone in football history, special commemorative patches were featured during the 2026 FIFA World Cup Group F match between Tunisia and Japan in Monterrey.

Items.Title: Eintracht Frankfurt
Items.Description:
